connectorUiConfig.title: Cisco Duo Security v2 Logs (CCF) (Preview)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The Cisco Duo Security data connector ingests **authentication**, **activity**, and **telephony** logs from the [Duo Admin API v2](https://duo.com/docs/adminapi) into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework. Because the Duo Admin API requires per-request HMAC-SHA1 signing (which CCF cannot perform natively), this connector polls a lightweight **signing proxy** (an Azure Function you deploy) that signs each request and forwards it to Duo. DCR-based ingestion-time transformations parse the events into typed columns for better query performance.

sampleQueries.query:
DuoSecurityActivity_CL
 | summarize count() by tostring(Actor.name), tostring(Action)

DuoSecurityTelephony_CL
 | summarize Credits = sum(Credits) by Telephony_type, Context

dataTypes.name: DuoSecurityAuthentication_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
DuoSecurityAuthentication_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: DuoSecurityActivity_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
DuoSecurityActivity_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: DuoSecurityTelephony_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
DuoSecurityTelephony_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Duo signing proxy
customs.description: Deploy the Duo HMAC signing proxy (Azure Function) included with this solution and obtain its base URL (e.g. https://<app>.azurewebsites.net/api) and a function key. The proxy holds the Duo secret key in Key Vault; only its URL and function key are entered here.

customs.name: Duo Admin API credentials
customs.description: A Duo Admin API application (integration key, secret key and API hostname) with **Grant read log** permission. Configured on the signing proxy, not in Microsoft Sentinel. See the [Duo Admin API documentation](https://duo.com/docs/adminapi#first-steps).

instructionSteps.description: **Prerequisite:** deploy the Duo HMAC signing proxy first (see the solution's `signing-proxy/` deployment), then provide its base URL and function key below and click **Connect**. The connector creates three pollers (authentication, activity, telephony) against that proxy.

parameters.label: Connect Duo signing proxy
parameters.title: Connect Duo signing proxy
parameters.subtitle: Provide the signing proxy URL and function key

parameters.label: Function key
parameters.placeholder: Azure Functions key for the signing proxy
parameters.name: functionKey
